metadata.title: Use Cases | Compute Rental
metadata.description: Run AI training, inference, rendering, transcription, and other workloads quickly and flexibly on high-performance GPUs.

hero.description: From training and fine-tuning to rendering and transcription, run demanding workloads on high-performance GPUs with flexible on-demand capacity.

items.title: AI text generation
items.desc: Deploy large language models for text generation, conversational AI, content creation, and code assistance with low-latency GPU inference.

items.title: AI image and video generation
items.desc: Run Stable Diffusion, Midjourney alternatives, and video-generation models to turn prompts into production-ready creative output.

items.title: AI agents
items.desc: Build and run autonomous AI agents for task automation, decision support, and complex workflow orchestration.

items.title: Batch data processing
items.desc: Accelerate large data pipelines, ETL jobs, and batch inference workloads across terabyte-scale datasets.

items.title: Audio-to-text transcription
items.desc: Use models such as Whisper for accurate speech recognition and transcription across multilingual, streaming, and batch workloads.

items.title: AI fine-tuning
items.desc: Fine-tune foundation models on private datasets with LoRA, QLoRA, and other efficient methods to create task-specific models.

items.title: Virtual computing
items.desc: Launch high-performance virtual desktops and remote workstations for AI development, data science, and professional workflows.

items.title: GPU programming
items.desc: Access CUDA, OpenCL, and GPU compute resources directly for scientific computing, simulation, and custom kernel development.

items.title: Graphics rendering
items.desc: Use GPU acceleration for 3D rendering, animation, and visual effects with engines such as Blender and Unreal Engine.

highlights.title: Open-model workflows, full control, no platform premium
highlights.subtitle: Access high-performance GPUs directly, run open-source models with prebuilt templates, and keep your stack under your control.

items.title: Ready-to-use templates
items.desc: Skip environment setup and launch fully configured GPU instances in minutes with prebuilt templates.

items.title: Low-cost GPU capacity
items.desc: Use a 20,000+ GPU resource pool with competitive pricing across RTX 5090, 4090, H100, and H200 instances.

items.title: Open source first
items.desc: Run vLLM, TGI, ComfyUI, and other open frameworks without proprietary licensing fees or platform markups.

items.title: Flexible deployment
items.desc: Bring your own models, scale inference your way, and resize capacity on demand without wasted spend.

cta.titleLine2: running AI workloads on our platform

visual.audioTranscription: In computational biology, high-performance compute is accelerating drug discovery at a new pace. Distributed GPU clusters can reduce protein-folding simulations from weeks to hours, speeding up research while lowering the barrier for smaller teams...
visual.imagePrompt: Generate a futuristic GPU cargo drone flying through a dramatic desert landscape.
visual.chatUserMessage: Summarize the main quantum computing breakthroughs in 2024.
chatAiLines: Quantum computing made notable progress in 2024:
3. Fault-tolerant simulation reached commercial cloud environments...

ai-text-generation.title: AI text generation
ai-text-generation.description: Launch and scale modern large language models in minutes with GPU-accelerated distributed inference.
builtFor: Start open-source models such as LLaMA 3 and DeepSeek, or load your own fine-tuned checkpoints.
Skip DevOps setup with prebuilt vLLM, TGI, and Oobabooga inference images.
Serve models through a clean API or WebUI with less manual setup before launch.
Keep full control of the runtime. Models run on isolated GPUs and data can be cleared to your requirements.

ai-image-video-generation.title: AI image and video generation
ai-image-video-generation.description: Generate high-quality images and video efficiently with GPU-powered creative workflows.
ai-image-video-generation.imageAlt: AI image and video generation workflow
builtFor: Generate high-resolution output with models such as Stable Diffusion and Disco Diffusion.
Start preconfigured creative environments optimized for generation workloads in minutes.
Access powerful GPUs for compute-heavy rendering while keeping budgets controlled.
Use Stable Diffusion and Disco Diffusion templates to simplify deployment and resource management.

ai-agents.title: AI agents
ai-agents.description: Deploy and scale AI agent workloads on cost-effective GPU compute.
builtFor: Run the frameworks you already use, including LangChain, Langflow, AutoGen, CrewAI, or custom code.
Scale agent workloads smoothly from a single node to distributed clusters.
Use usage dashboards to track GPU, CPU, and cost metrics while paying by actual runtime.
Package Docker images, libraries, CUDA, and driver versions into reusable templates.
Switch to open-source equivalents through OpenAI-compatible chat endpoints and reduce per-token cost.

batch-data-processing.title: Batch data processing
batch-data-processing.description: Accelerate large-scale data processing and automated ETL jobs with reliable GPU performance.
builtFor: Automate large data transformation, cleaning, and preparation tasks.
Allocate compute resources dynamically around batch job requirements.
Reduce idle cost with usage-based billing and interruptible instance options.
Connect easily to existing data pipelines or cloud storage.

audio-to-text-transcription.title: Audio-to-text transcription
audio-to-text-transcription.description: Convert audio into accurate text quickly with GPU-driven transcription workloads.
builtFor: Use open-source models to turn audio files into accurate transcripts.
Process large transcription workloads through scalable GPU access.
Support multilingual and common audio formats inside locked containers.
Start ready-to-use speech-to-text environments through one-click actions or CLI.

ai-fine-tuning.title: AI fine-tuning
ai-fine-tuning.description: Improve model behavior with efficient, on-demand fine-tuning workflows.
builtFor: Train and optimize pretrained models on your own datasets for task-specific results.
Use powerful GPUs to shorten training time and reduce cost.
Match storage, memory, and compute resources to model scale.
Deploy fine-tuned models into inference environments after training.

virtual-computing.title: Virtual computing
virtual-computing.description: Provision GPU-backed virtual machines with flexible, secure access.
builtFor: Launch GPU-backed virtual desktops or remote workstations in seconds.
Run Linux or Ubuntu with full access to your preferred tools and workflows.
Resize resources on demand without changing cloud providers or plans.
Keep work isolated inside dedicated environments.

gpu-programming.title: GPU programming
gpu-programming.description: Accelerate AI and HPC breakthroughs with scalable GPU compute performance.
builtFor: Access raw GPU compute for custom CUDA application development.
Optimize performance for specific architectures such as A100 and 4090.
Use full admin access to configure drivers, memory, and execution environments.
Test and iterate across GPU types with minimal setup.

3d-rendering.title: Graphics rendering
3d-rendering.description: Accelerate 3D rendering and graphics workflows with powerful GPU acceleration.
builtFor: Render detail-rich 3D models faster with GPU acceleration.
Reduce frame time and scene-processing time for complex animation or visualization.
Access professional-grade GPUs without long-term contracts.
Support VFX, product design, architecture, and other rendering workflows.

Footer.tagline: A high-performance AI compute scheduling platform built around token economics, giving global developers compute resources they can use immediately.

workloads.title: Built for AI workloads
workloads.subtitle: We bring performance, scale, and operational expertise together so AI teams can move from ambition to execution faster.

items.title: Move to market faster
hoverBullets: Use a full-stack AI-native cloud platform to access NVIDIA GPUs at leading speed and scale, shorten development cycles, and bring solutions to market sooner.
Our Kubernetes-native development experience combines bare-metal infrastructure, automated provisioning, and support for leading workload orchestration frameworks.

items.title:
Industry-leading performance
and efficiency
hoverBullets: Reduce interruptions, improve cluster utilization, and resolve issues near real time so teams stay productive and focused on innovation.
Resilient infrastructure, disciplined node lifecycle management, deep observability, and 24/7 engineering support help keep critical workloads moving.

items.title:
Real-time reliability
and resilience
hoverBullets: Accelerate training and inference on production-ready high-performance clusters designed for maximum reliability and better total cost of ownership.
Access advanced compute, storage, and networking with strict health checks and automated lifecycle management, so AI workloads can run in hours instead of weeks.

items.quote: CoreWeave's ability to provide reliable, cutting-edge hardware has consistently met the needs of our critical workloads. We also value how they tailor solutions to our unique requirements, helping us optimize performance and respond to fast-moving markets.
items.author: Craig Falls
items.title: Head of Quantitative Research

items.quote: CoreWeave was one of our earliest and largest compute partners. They helped us build hyperscale compute clusters, support the creation of widely known models, and deliver these systems at the scale our customers need.
items.author: Sam Altman
items.title: CEO

items.quote: We work closely with the CoreWeave team to build infrastructure together. As we continue shipping frontier models, their clusters have remained first class in reliability and stability.
items.author: Arthur Mensch
items.title: Founder and CEO

items.quote: Our partnership with CoreWeave has significantly accelerated our model training cycles. Their API-first infrastructure is stable, highly scalable, and exactly what modern AI workflows require.
items.author: Alexandr Wang
items.title: CEO

items.quote: CoreWeave provides high-performance GPU instances that let us deploy large open-source models efficiently. Their stable network helps keep our models available to the community.
items.author: Clem Delangue
items.title: CEO

items.quote: Building advanced Claude models requires large-scale, uninterrupted compute. CoreWeave's infrastructure provides exactly that, letting our researchers focus on algorithmic breakthroughs.
items.author: Dario Amodei
items.title: CEO

enterprise.title: Enterprise-ready from day one
enterprise.subtitle: Built for scale, security, and reliability so demanding workloads can run with confidence.

items.title: 99.9% uptime
items.description: Run critical workloads with confidence on infrastructure designed for industry-leading reliability.

items.title: Secure by default
items.description: Independently audited controls and end-to-end data protection support enterprise security requirements.

items.title: Scale to thousands of GPUs

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Key details about compute rental, product resources, and billing.

items.question: What types of GPUs can I rent?
items.answer: We offer a range of high-performance GPU resources, including NVIDIA H100, A100, RTX 4090, and similar options for AI training, inference, and compute tasks at different scales.

items.question: How does billing work?
items.answer: The platform uses transparent usage-based billing, typically charged by actual runtime with no hidden fees. Long-term or steady workloads can also use more suitable pricing plans.

items.question: Is there a minimum rental duration?
items.answer: There is no strict minimum rental limit. You can start instances on demand for short experiments or keep them running for production workloads.

items.question: What technical support is available?
items.answer: We provide support for compute infrastructure and help with deployment, connectivity, runtime issues, resource usage, and practical optimization.

items.question: Can compute resources scale dynamically?
items.answer: Yes. You can choose and adjust GPU nodes from the console as workloads change, matching resource scale to training, inference, or batch-processing needs.

infrastructure.title: Next-generation compute infrastructure
infrastructure.description: We provide a fully optimized compute environment, from bare-metal hardware to container orchestration, tuned layer by layer for demanding workloads.

recommendations.title: Recommended compute profiles
recommendations.description: For this workload, we selected GPU profiles that balance performance, efficiency, and delivery readiness.

cta.description: Chosen by AI labs and enterprise teams worldwide. From a single node to large GPU clusters, capacity scales with your workload.

llm-training.heroSubtitle: Bare-metal NVIDIA H100 nodes on the Hopper architecture, connected through InfiniBand NDR 400G, built for frontier-scale language model training.

features.title: RDMA lossless networking
features.description: InfiniBand NDR fabric enables full-speed GPU memory access with ultra-low latency between training nodes.

features.title: High-performance compute base
features.description: Each node can pair 8x H100 80GB SXM5 GPUs with high-bandwidth NVLink for tensor-heavy distributed training.

features.title: Parallel storage acceleration
features.description: A parallel file-system layer sustains high-throughput reads and writes so I/O does not throttle large training jobs.

ai-inference.heroSubtitle: Low-latency responses, multi-model hot swapping, and serverless autoscaling for production-grade inference workloads.

features.title: Serverless scheduling
features.description: Scale instances with live traffic, reduce idle capacity, and keep inference endpoints responsive under changing demand.

features.title: Low-latency inference acceleration
features.description: Optimized TensorRT and vLLM runtime paths improve throughput and response time compared with generic serving stacks.

features.title: Global active-active deployment
features.description: Regional compute pools and redundancy help inference services stay stable during high-concurrency traffic spikes.

ai-inference.visualContent:
// High-throughput inference with vLLM
from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams

prompts = ["Explain quantum computing in 100 words."]
sampling_params = SamplingParams(temperature=0.8, top_p=0.95)

llm = LLM(model="llama-3-70b-instruct", tensor_parallel_size=4)
outputs = llm.generate(prompts, sampling_params)

recommendedGpus.specs: A practical balance of cost and deployment density

high-concurrency-inference.heroSubtitle: An elastic inference stack designed for production APIs that need stable latency under heavy daily request volume.

features.title: Serverless architecture
features.description: Expand on demand when requests arrive and reduce idle spend when traffic is quiet.

features.title: Optimized inference kernels
features.description: TensorRT-based acceleration helps shorten response time for common model-serving paths.

features.title: Global acceleration fabric
features.description: Multi-region deployment patterns reduce user-facing latency across different markets.

high-concurrency-inference.visualContent:
// vLLM inference request
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "llama3", "prompt": "..."}'

metadata.title: Contact us | Compute Rental
metadata.description: Contact the Compute Rental team for enterprise GPU capacity, technical support, compliance materials, and partnership inquiries.

hero.title: Route your compute request to the right team.
hero.description: Whether you need enterprise GPU reservations, technical support, compliance materials, or partnership help, share the context and we will route it to the right commercial, engineering, or security team.

formPanel.title: Describe your request
formPanel.description: This form creates an email draft so you can keep the context and confirm before sending.

Contact.channelsDescription: For signed-in users, rental, order, and finance issues can also be handled from the matching console page.

sales.title: Enterprise and pre-sales
sales.description: Capacity reservations, batch GPU procurement, dedicated networking, purchasing workflows, and enterprise contract support.
sales.subject: Enterprise and pre-sales inquiry

support.title: Technical support
support.description: Instance connectivity, billing orders, deployment environments, API calls, and production escalation paths.

compliance.title: Compliance and security materials
compliance.description: Request SOC 2 reports, NDA workflows, security questionnaires, and data-processing documentation.
compliance.subject: Compliance and security materials request

response.title: How we respond from request to delivery
response.description: Enterprise capacity, production incidents, and compliance requests follow different handling paths. The clearer the context, the faster the team can provide timing and next steps.

requirements.title: Confirm requirements
requirements.description: We clarify GPU models, quantities, regions, network isolation, and rental duration.

assessment.title: Assess the plan
assessment.description: Commercial or engineering teams review inventory, pricing, delivery windows, and access patterns.

launch.title: Support launch
launch.description: Production issues are escalated by support level, while enterprise customers can receive dedicated response paths.

preparation.title: Information to prepare before contacting us
preparation.description: If you are evaluating enterprise capacity or need technical support, including the following details can reduce back-and-forth confirmation.
items: Target GPU model, card count, and expected usage duration
Workload type, such as training, inference, rendering, or API deployment
Whether private networking, fixed regions, or compliance materials are required
Expected launch timeline and budget range

metadata.title: GPU Hosting | Compute Rental
metadata.description: Host GPU hardware on the platform, reach customers, use support and billing workflows, and keep control of your pricing.

hero.title: 120,000 AI developers need your GPUs
hero.description: List your hardware on a large GPU compute marketplace. We handle customers, support, billing, and deal flow; you control pricing and earn.

platform.title: Everything you need to run a GPU business
platform.description: A full-stack platform for GPU operators.

cards.title: Customers and support
cards.description: Developers actively search for compute. We handle support, billing, and discovery so you do not need to talk to customers unless you want to.

cards.title: Hardware and financing
cards.description: Source GPUs through vetted suppliers, use financing partners, and presell capacity before it goes live.

cards.title: Your terms, your control
cards.description: Set your own prices, choose rental types, and configure GPU, CPU, storage, and bandwidth billing.

hostTypes.title: Who hosts on the platform
hostTypes.description: From data center operators to first-time hosts, the platform supports every scale.

cards.title: Data centers and colo operators
cards.description: Run flagship GPUs with verified trust, priority placement, and enterprise deal flow.

cards.title: GPU farm operators
cards.description: Turn dedicated GPU infrastructure into a compute business and line up demand before new hardware arrives.

cards.title: Getting started
cards.description: From a single workstation to your first rack, list what you have while the platform handles discovery, support, and billing.

responsibilities.title: What we handle vs. what you handle
responsibilities.description: You focus on hardware. We focus on everything else.
responsibilities.note: Our support team resolves customer issues so hosts can focus on keeping infrastructure reliable.

presell.title: Sell capacity before your hardware arrives
presell.description: Planning a new deployment? Share upcoming GPU availability and timelines with our sales team so we can match you with customers looking for reserved compute.

hardware.title: Finance and source hardware through the platform

cards.title: GPU financing
cards.description: Finance GPU hardware with partners who can factor platform earnings into the review. Submit once and compare options.

cards.title: GPU hardware
cards.description: Source new or certified refurbished GPUs through vetted suppliers. Units can be stress-tested and platform-ready.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Three steps from hardware to revenue.

steps.title: List your hardware
steps.description: Install the lightweight client. Your machines can appear on the platform in minutes.

steps.title: Set your terms
steps.description: Price your GPUs, choose rental types, and configure billing.

steps.title: We bring the customers
steps.description: Developers discover your GPUs, revenue flows automatically, and support is handled by the platform.

items.question: How do I start hosting?
items.answer: Create an account, install the client on your GPU machine, verify hardware availability, and publish your pricing terms.

items.question: How do I get data center certified?
items.answer: Contact the host team with your facility profile, network details, inventory, and support processes so they can review certification fit.

items.question: How long does verification take?
items.answer: Single machines can usually be listed quickly after software setup. Larger or certified deployments require a deeper operations review.

items.question: How do I track my earnings?
items.answer: Hosts can monitor utilization, jobs, rates, payments, and demand from the dashboard.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: You set host pricing and availability terms. The platform handles discovery, scheduling, support, and payment collection.

items.question: What GPUs can I host?
items.answer: Common NVIDIA data center and workstation GPUs can be listed when they meet reliability, driver, memory, and network requirements.

items.question: Can I finance GPU hardware through the platform?
items.answer: Financing partners can evaluate platform earnings and deployment plans to help operators source or expand GPU inventory.

bottomCta.title: Ready to start earning?
bottomCta.description: Join hosts already earning revenue from GPU compute demand.

metadata.title: GPU Hardware | Compute Rental
metadata.description: Source new or certified refurbished GPU servers through vetted suppliers and prepare them for platform hosting.

hero.title: Source GPUs that are ready to earn
hero.description: Use our vetted supplier network for new or certified refurbished GPU servers. Each unit can be stress-tested, benchmarked, and prepared for platform hosting from day one.

steps.title: How it works
steps.description: Submit once. We source options from multiple suppliers.

items.title: Tell us what you need
items.description: Share the GPU models, quantity, condition preference, and delivery window. We will match the request with suitable suppliers.

items.title: We source and test
items.description: Our team compares new and refurbished options, then completes the required verification flow before delivery.

items.title: Deploy and earn
items.description: Once certified, the hardware is ready for client installation and platform listing so your GPUs can start producing revenue quickly.

value.title: Why source through the platform
value.description: Your GPU hardware partner should be more than a reseller. We combine new and refurbished supply channels with platform hosting readiness as the target outcome.

cards.title: Volume pricing
cards.description: Our purchasing volume and supplier relationships help unlock pricing that is hard to secure alone.

cards.title: Platform ready
cards.description: Hardware can arrive prepared for platform hosting. Install the client, list the machine, and move toward revenue faster.

cards.title: Vast certified
cards.description: Each unit can pass GPU verification with stress, memory, benchmark, and thermal results included.

cards.title: Financing aligned
cards.description: Hardware sourcing can connect with financing options to help you expand GPU capacity faster.

certification.title: What you receive: platform certification
certification.description: Before shipment, each device can pass our GPU verification flow. Orders include certification results for hosting and operations planning.

items.title: Memory verification
items.description: Complete memory checks with no defects

metadata.title: GPU Financing | Compute Rental
metadata.description: Connect GPU hosts and infrastructure operators with financing partners who understand platform revenue and GPU deployments.

hero.title: Finance GPUs. Let revenue help pay for them.
hero.description: We connect hosts with financing partners focused on GPU infrastructure. Your platform revenue can strengthen the application, and one inquiry can be reviewed by multiple partners.

steps.title: How it works
steps.description: Three steps from inquiry to funded hardware.

items.title: Tell us what you need
items.description: Share the GPU models, timeline, and budget. If you already host on the platform, your earnings history can help support the request.

items.title: We match financing partners
items.description: Partners review the request and compete for your business. Platform performance data can reduce paperwork and speed up underwriting.

items.title: Fund hardware and start earning
items.description: After financing is approved, deploy the GPUs on the platform and use generated revenue to support repayment.

flywheel.title: The GPU financing flywheel
flywheel.description: Finance hardware, deploy it, earn revenue, and use that performance to fund more capacity.

items.title: Finance
items.description: Match with infrastructure financing partners

items.title: Deploy
items.description: Bring hardware online on the platform

items.title: Expand
items.description: Revenue history can support more financing

items.title: Earn
items.description: Generate revenue from developers

structures.title: Financing structures
structures.description: Financing partners can tailor structures around GPU infrastructure investments.

cards.title: Equipment-backed lease
cards.description: The GPU hardware supports the financing. This can fit hosts that are scaling but do not yet have long business credit histories.

cards.title: Revenue-based loan
cards.description: Repayment can align with platform revenue. When earnings grow, repayment can move faster; when demand softens, payment structure may adapt.

cards.title: Traditional equipment financing
cards.description: Fixed-term equipment loans with predictable payments. This can fit mature operators that want cost certainty.

cards.title: Sale-leaseback
cards.description: Already own GPU hardware? Sell equipment to a financing partner and lease it back to release capital while keeping machines online.

certification.title: What you receive: platform certification
certification.description: Each device can pass our GPU verification flow before deployment. Orders can include certification results for finance review and operations planning.

items.title: Burn-in test
items.description: 72 hours of full-load stress testing

items.title: Memory verification
items.description: Complete memory checks with no defects

items.title: Benchmark score
items.description: Performance compared with reference results

items.title: Thermal profile
items.description: Cooling behavior confirmed under sustained load

cards.title: Need to source hardware first?
cards.description: GPU financing can be paired with hardware sourcing. New and certified refurbished units can be prepared for platform hosting.

cards.title: Ready to expand your hosting?
cards.description: Use vetted suppliers, financing partners, or both to grow your GPU infrastructure.

metadata.title: Data Center Certification | Compute Rental
metadata.description: Apply for data center certification to earn a trust label, priority placement, and dedicated support for professional GPU hosting.

hero.title: Become a Certified Data Center
hero.description: Run 5+ GPU servers in a professionally managed facility? Apply for Certified Data Center status to earn a blue trust label, priority platform placement, and increased customer traffic.

benefits.title: Why get certified?
benefits.description: Certified Data Centers receive visible trust signals and algorithmic advantages on the platform.

cards.title: Blue Trust Label
cards.description: Your offers display a verified blue label on the platform, signaling professional-grade infrastructure to renters.

cards.title: Priority Placement
cards.description: Certified machines are auto-sorted higher in search results, so enterprise customers find you first.

cards.title: Increased Traffic
cards.description: We actively direct more user flow to certified hosts because of the quality and reliability of their equipment.

cards.title: Dedicated Support
cards.description: Get direct access to the operations team for onboarding, troubleshooting, and day-to-day support.

requirements.title: What it takes
requirements.description: You provide GPU hardware in a professional environment. We list your machines with a blue trust label and prioritize them on the platform. Clients rent your GPUs, and you earn based on usage.

cards.title: Professional Environment
cards.description: Servers housed in a professionally managed data center facility with reliable power, cooling, and network infrastructure.

cards.title: Minimum 5 GPU Servers
cards.description: At least 5 servers equipped with flagship-class GPU hardware such as A100, H100, H200, RTX 4090, or RTX 5090.

cards.title: Verified Business
cards.description: Equipment owned by a registered business. Owners complete identity verification and sign the Data Center Hosting Agreement.

cards.title: Security Standards
cards.description: Certifications like ISO 27001, SOC 2, or equivalent are encouraged and strengthen the application.

bottomCta.title: Ready to scale your hosting business?
bottomCta.description: Explore financing to expand your GPU fleet, or source certified hardware through our vetted supplier network.

certificationForm.title: Apply for Certification
certificationForm.description: Tell us about your facility. We review applications within 2 business days.

operationsNotes.label: Operational Notes
operationsNotes.placeholder: Cooling redundancy, carrier mix, remote hands, incident response, or any other facility details.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us what you want certified, target launch timing, and anything the review team should know.

metadata.title: GPU Computing | Compute Rental
metadata.description: Access AI-optimized NVIDIA GPUs for training, inference, and generative AI workloads.

hero.title: GPU Computing
hero.description: Access leading AI-optimized NVIDIA GPUs quickly, with capacity for training, inference, and generative AI applications.

gb200.title: NVIDIA GB200 NVL72
gb200.description: An industry-leading platform for building and deploying the newest generative AI applications.

features.title: Major performance gains
features.description: Compared with H100 architecture, training performance can improve up to 4x, and real-time trillion-parameter inference can improve up to 30x.

features.title: Stronger compute access
features.description: A single server integrates 72 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs and 36 NVIDIA Grace CPUs for higher-density compute.

features.title: Massive-scale clusters
features.description: Connect tens of thousands of NVIDIA Blackwell systems in one site and unlock 100K+ GPU cluster capacity.

features.title: Designed for sustained growth
features.description: Liquid-cooled GPU design supports rack power up to 130 kW for dense AI infrastructure.

h200.title: NVIDIA H200 Tensor Core GPU
h200.description: Early access to NVIDIA H200 Tensor Core GPUs helps teams bring AI applications to market faster.

features.title: Outstanding performance
features.description: Up to 1.9x performance compared with H100 Tensor Core GPUs.

features.title: Expanded memory capacity
features.description: Each server provides 1,128 GB of total GPU memory for the large datasets behind generative AI workloads.

features.title: Ultra-fast interconnect
features.description: 3200 Gbps NVIDIA Quantum-2 InfiniBand networking enables low-latency GPU-to-GPU connectivity.

features.title: Optimized GPU efficiency
features.description: NVIDIA BlueField-3 DPUs offload networking and storage tasks to improve GPU utilization during model development.

h100.title: NVIDIA H100 Tensor Core GPU
h100.description: A platform that helped set MLPerf records and build world-class high-speed supercomputing capacity.

features.title: Stronger training performance
features.description: Up to 4x training performance compared with NVIDIA A100 Tensor Core GPUs.

features.title: Record-setting training results
features.description: The platform has used 3,500 H100 GPUs to complete full GPT-3 large language model training in 11 minutes.

features.title: Unlock more GPU capacity
features.description: NVIDIA BlueField-3 DPU offload lets GPUs focus on training, experiments, and compute-intensive tasks.

l40s.title: NVIDIA L40S GPU
l40s.description: Right-sized compute for workloads that need efficiency without overprovisioning.

features.title: Excellent performance at lower cost
features.description: Up to 2x the performance of A40 instances, with 733 TFLOPs of compute and NVIDIA BlueField-3 DPU offload.

features.title: More flexible compute access
features.description: Each system can use 8 L40S GPUs with Platinum Intel Emerald Rapids processors for generative AI workloads.

features.title: Flexible configuration
features.description: Access NVIDIA L40 configurations and choose the right compute scale for each workload.

quote.text: "Training advanced models and running large-scale inference requires synchronizing trillions of operations across tens of billions of parameters. Teams need enormous compute resources to do that well."
quote.author: - Brannin McBee, Co-founder and Chief Development Officer

sku.title: More GPU SKUs
paragraphs: Configure compute resources on demand and choose the right GPU for different workloads.
A broad GPU portfolio gives teams flexibility across different levels of complexity.
All are equipped with DPUs and delivered on bare metal.

market.title: Get to market faster
paragraphs: Our platform helps teams access frontier compute and move the next AI breakthrough forward.
Run jobs on high-performance clusters and complete more work in less time.

cards.title: Consistent stable performance
cards.description: Scale alone is not enough. Stable performance helps teams save GPU hours and reduce daily interruptions.

cards.title: Efficient infrastructure
cards.description: Higher system utilization helps teams reach the same performance level with less infrastructure.

cards.title: Resilience from the start
cards.description: Automated health checks and node lifecycle management help maintain cluster performance and recovery.

bottomCta.title: Start building now
bottomCta.description: Access enhanced GPU computing capacity for generative AI workloads.

hero.title: What we do
hero.textAfter: built to scale, support, and accelerate GenAI. We combine infrastructure and strategic partnership to help teams deploy AI at scale today and in the future. We manage the complexity of AI growth, make supercomputing accessible, and keep pushing the boundaries of what is possible.

values.title: Our values
values.description: We believe in people. As fast movers and forward thinkers, our values guide how we work.

items.title: Keep learning and keep innovating
items.subtitle: Mindset & Curiosity
items.description: We cultivate a learning mindset and treat curiosity as the engine of innovation. We seek information, challenge assumptions, and value diverse perspectives.

items.title: Trust transparently and support success
items.subtitle: Trust & Support
items.description: We trust each other to make decisions, communicate clearly, and share the tools, resources, and feedback needed for success.

items.title: Take ownership and act
items.subtitle: Accountability & Initiative
items.description: We own our work and decisions. We move proactively, solve problems directly, and build a culture where everyone can contribute to shared success.

items.title: Put customers first
items.subtitle: Customer Obsession
items.description: We work to understand customer needs deeply and exceed expectations at every step, building long-term partnerships through excellent service.

items.title: Collaborate as one team
items.subtitle: Collaboration
items.description: Collaboration unlocks our potential. By bringing different perspectives together, we solve harder problems and reach goals no one could achieve alone.

team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: Meet the people building the platform

partners.title: Our customers and partners
partners.subtitle: These customers trust us with business-critical AI workloads.

vision.paragraph1: We started the company as machine learning engineers solving our own scaling problems and building the tools we wanted to use. That work became a mission to build gigawatt-scale AI factories for teams pushing the frontier.
vision.paragraph2: Our mission is to make compute as available as electricity, so everyone can access superintelligence. From a single GPU to hundreds of thousands, our infrastructure powers AI services used by millions.

metadata.title: Enterprise Solutions | Compute Rental
metadata.description: Secure, scalable AI infrastructure for enterprise teams running hundreds to thousands of GPUs.

hero.description: From hundreds to thousands of GPUs, we work with enterprises to design custom deployments that deliver performance, control, and reliability without traditional cloud complexity.

cards.title: Customer stories
cards.desc: Explore real enterprise use cases and success stories.

cards.title: Bulk pricing for large workloads
cards.desc: Custom pricing tiers and volume discounts for AI deployments.

cards.title: Compliance-ready infrastructure
cards.desc: Dedicated GPU clusters for regulated and high-compliance environments.

cards.title: Private networking and storage
cards.desc: Secure routes, high bandwidth, and scalable storage options.

cards.title: White-glove support
cards.desc: Dedicated onboarding, optimization, and 24/7 enterprise support.

cards.title: Custom software and workflows
cards.desc: Custom environments and workflow support for advanced ML and AI projects.

caseStudies.title: See how enterprises build faster with us

stats.label: Scaled from zero to 200,000 monthly active users in 12 months with no CapEx.
Large multi-GPU clusters support large language model training.
Machine learning teams can reduce large GPU workload costs by up to 80%.

caseStudies.quote: "Some experiments were not cost-effective anywhere else. This platform let us experiment at real scale."
caseStudies.author: - Founder and CEO, AI consulting company

support.title: From onboarding to production, your team has a clear support path
support.desc: Enterprise-grade support helps teams move projects forward quickly and confidently.

features.title: Flexible support tiers
features.desc: Start with standard support and upgrade to premium tiers with white-glove service and a dedicated account manager.

features.title: Onboarding and optimization
features.desc: Work directly with engineers to configure, launch, and continuously optimize your deployment.

features.title: Priority response and escalation
features.desc: Get SLA-backed response times and clear escalation paths for production-critical issues.

features.title: Live support and expert access
features.desc: Access real-time technical support plus AI infrastructure architecture and troubleshooting guidance.

compliance.title: Isolated infrastructure with full data control
compliance.desc: Secure compute environments built for regulated industries and critical workloads.

features.title: Single-tenant isolation
features.desc: Deploy on dedicated GPU hardware with no shared compute, ensuring strong environment isolation.

features.title: Data sovereignty
features.desc: Control the data lifecycle, delete workloads on demand, and remove residual data across the stack.

features.title: Custom security configuration
features.desc: Enable private VPN, persistent audit logs, and custom security profiles for compliance needs.

features.title: Complete access environment
features.desc: Work directly through SSH, CLI, API, or Jupyter with root-level control over GPU instances.

pricing.title: The larger your deployment, the more you can save
pricing.desc: Flexible pricing agreements for teams running large-scale, long-term workloads.

features.title: Volume discounts
features.desc: Negotiate custom pricing based on reserved capacity and usage tiers.

features.title: Reserved GPU contracts
features.desc: Lock in favorable rates with long-term reservations for critical workloads.

features.title: Transparent costs
features.desc: Clear pricing up front with no surprises and no hidden fees.

features.title: Flexible commitments
features.desc: Adjust contract terms as project scale expands or contracts.

networking.title: Private networking and storage
networking.desc: Infrastructure flexibility for advanced teams, including private networks, dedicated bandwidth, and configurable storage.

features.title: Private networks and VPN
features.desc: Configure secure subnets, network routes, and VPN access for isolated deployments.

features.title: Regional and hybrid setup
features.desc: Choose specific server regions or combine platform GPUs with internal infrastructure.

features.title: Custom storage and access control
features.desc: Use scalable storage with advanced user permission management.

features.title: Dedicated bandwidth
features.desc: Reserve high-speed connectivity for performance-sensitive workloads.

customSoftware.title: Custom software and advanced workflows
customSoftware.desc: Support complex use cases, from specialized ML frameworks to custom orchestration setups.
items: Tailored cluster configuration for niche AI and ML workflows
Deployment of proprietary or custom-built software stacks
Support for unique orchestration and scheduling requirements

bottomCta.description: Enterprise-grade security, custom deployments, and world-class support. We provide the GPU infrastructure your team needs without compromise.
